caption: A large, formal assembly hall is filled with a crowd of people seated in tiered rows facing a front platform. The room features an ornate, geometric coffered ceiling with recessed circular lighting and light-colored walls. On the front wall, a large light-blue textured panel is flanked by two digital screens displaying a blue-toned image of another assembly. A podium sits centered before the panel. The attendees are dressed in a variety of colorful attire, including traditional garments and business wear, and are seen sitting and listening. Throughout the sequence, the scene remains static with very little movement; the people remain in their seats, and the visuals on the screens and the overall lighting of the hall do not change. No legible on-screen text or logos are visible in the frames.
